svg.title: Open Agentic CMO — Deterministic Multi-Agent Workflow
svg.desc: A 5-phase deterministic multi-agent content workflow. Porky orchestrates from the start, delegating to Babe for Research, owning Strategy himself, then handing off to Hamm for Content and Pumba for Notion persistence and Delivery. Each phase produces a structured artifact and a signal. Core principles are signals, artifacts, validation gates, and idempotency.
svg.text: Deterministic multi-agent workflow for research, strategy, content, Notion, and delivery
